'''Tanlin Sha''', an [[un'Yala]] of the [[Rellarin]] people, was a principal advisor to the [[Swaze]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] period. Though Sha never left the Rellarin homeworld of [[Rellnas Minor]], the Swaze leaders would visit Sha and other Rellarin sages once every standard year.
